onChange.script:
if origin == 'BindingWriteback':
		data = self.custom.reason
		if data:
			data = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
#			system.perspective.print('Running Change Script1 {}'.format(data))
			data = data[0]
#			system.perspective.print('Running Change Script2 {}'.format(data))
			data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
#			system.perspective.print('Running Change Script3 {}'.format(data))
	#		system.perspective.print(data)
			resp = BlueRidge.Config.FailureReason.update(data)
			if resp == -1:
#				system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")
				pass

data = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(self.view.custom.instance)
	reassignedNumbers = self.view.custom.reassignedNumbers
	assignedNumbers = [item for sublist in reassignedNumbers for item in sublist]
	data['assignedNumbers'] = assignedNumbers[:data["cylinderCount"]]
	resp = BlueRidge.Config.BlockConfig.update(data)
	if resp == 'success':
		system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")

import base64
	name = event.file.name
	image = base64.b64encode(event.file.getBytes())
	fileType = name.split('.')[-1]
	data = {'fileType': fileType, 'fileName':name, 'fileData':image, 'user':self.session.props.auth.user.userName, 'headConfigUUID':self.view.custom.selectedConfig}
	BlueRidge.Config.HeadConfig.addHeadFile(data)
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")

rowIndex = event.rowIndex
	imageData = self.props.data
	fileName = event.value
	fileType = imageData[rowIndex]['fileType']
	fileData = imageData[rowIndex]['fileData']
	headFileUUID = imageData[rowIndex]['headFileUUID']
	headConfigUUID = imageData[rowIndex]['headConfigUUID']
	user = self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	
	data = {
		'fileName': fileName,
		'fileType': fileType,
		'fileData': fileData,
		'headFileUUID': headFileUUID,
		'headConfigUUID': headConfigUUID,
		'user': user
	}
	
	BlueRidge.Config.HeadConfig.updateHeadFile(data)
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")

transforms.code:
data = {}
	if len(value['reason'])>0: #archive
		data = value['reason'][0]
	else: #add
		data['engineUUID']=value['engineUUID']
	return data

customMethods.name: getHeadConfigList
customMethods.script:
viewPath = "BlueRidge/Components/_Config/_Heads/HeadButton"
	initialList = self.view.custom.instance.configs
	views = []
	for config in initialList:
		settings = {
			'viewPath': viewPath,
			'viewParams':{'name':config['name'], 'value':config['headConfigUUID']},
			'direction': 'row',
			'justify': 'flex-start',
			'alignItems': 'flex-start'
		}
		views.append(settings)
	
	return views

customMethods.name: getHeadFilesArray
saveNewConfiguration
saveHeadGroup
customMethods.script:
allData = self.view.custom.infoToSave
	updateHeadData = {
		'headUUID': allData['headUUID'],
		'name': allData['headName'],
		'user': allData['user'],
		'active': allData['active'],
		'extensionTypeUUID': allData['extensionTypeUUID']
	}
	
	headResp = BlueRidge.Config.HeadConfig.updateHeadGroup(updateHeadData)

customMethods.name: saveHeadConfig
customMethods.script:
allData = self.view.custom.infoToSave
	updateConfigData = {
		'headUUID': allData['headUUID'],
		'headConfigUUID': allData['headConfigUUID'],
		'name': allData['headConfigName'],
		'user': allData['user'],
		'active': allData['active']
	}
	
	configResp = BlueRidge.Config.HeadConfig.updateHeadConfig(updateConfigData)

customMethods.name: formatExtensionTypesForDropdown

messageHandlers.script:
self.view.custom.selectedConfigName = payload['name']
	self.view.custom.selectedConfig = payload['value']
	trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger

self.view.custom.selectedConfig = None
	self.view.custom.selectedConfigName = ''
	self.view.custom.selectedData = payload['view']
	trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger

self.view.custom.infoToSave.headName = payload['newValue']
	self.saveHeadGroup()
	trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger

self.view.custom.selectedConfigName = payload['newValue']
	self.saveHeadConfig()
	trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger

self.view.custom.instance.available = payload['newValue']
	if self.view.custom.selectedConfig:
		self.saveNewConfiguration()
	else:
		self.saveHeadGroup()
	trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger

self.view.custom.infoToSave.extensionTypeUUID = payload['newValue']
	self.saveHeadGroup()
	trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger
